target.name: Anthropic

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in AI & Software. Range: $9.7B - $300.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in AI & Compute

private.name: OpenAI
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Private), post-money $300B+

private.name: Anysphere
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Private), post-money $29.3B

private.name: Neuralink
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Private), post-money $9.7B

data.narrative:
Anthropic is a private-stage AI & Software company currently valued at $183B, having raised $13B+. The peer universe comprises one public comparable (Palantir) and eight private peers, with three same-sector, same-stage companies serving as direct benchmarks: OpenAI ($300B), Anysphere ($29.3B), and Neuralink ($9.7B).

The peer-median method is the applicable triangulation approach given data availability. The median valuation across the three same-stage AI & Software peers is $29.3B, with a range spanning $9.7B to $300B. This wide dispersion reflects material heterogeneity in the competitive set; OpenAI's valuation substantially exceeds the median, while Neuralink trades below it. Applying standard ±15% adjustment bands around the peer median yields a triangulated valuation range of $24.9B (low) to $33.7B (high), with $29.3B as the central estimate.

The current $183B valuation sits materially above this peer-derived range, suggesting either a significant capital efficiency or market-position premium relative to comparable private companies, or potential overvaluation relative to the observable peer set. Key uncertainties include the representativeness of the three-company peer median in a rapidly evolving sector, the impact of recent capital raises on relative positioning, and the applicability of the Palantir public comparable to current private-market pricing. A second valuation method would strengthen confidence; current data supports a $24.9B–$33.7B range based on peer benchmarking alone.
